originalTitle: S&P 500, Nasdaq, hit record closing highs on AI optimism
summary: STORY: It was a mostly upbeat Tuesday on Wall Street, despite a slight move downward for the Dow. The S&P 500 climbed about six-tenths of a percent and the tech-heavy Nasdaq added roughly 1.2%, with both indexes closing at record highs. AI-fueled optimism offset concerns over Middle East peace talks, which were compounded by recent U.S. strikes on Iran. :: Micron Semiconductor stocks continued to lead the charge, with Micron Technology soaring 19%, hitting $1 trillion in market value for the first time after UBS more than tripled its price target on the stock. But Matt Stucky, chief portfolio manager for equities at Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management, finds the narrowness of market gains concerning. "Just to paint a picture of the contrast in the markets from pre-Iran conflict to post, if you look through the market for the first couple of months this year, 65% of companies were outperforming the index. Since the conflict commenced at the end of February, just 24% of companies are outperforming the S&P 500. [FLASH] Any time you see a market that becomes more narrow, as a portfolio manager, as an investor, you start to question the longevity and resilience of that market." Sticking with chip makers, shares of Qualcomm rose almost 4.5% after Bloomberg News reported the company reached a deal with TikTok owner ByteDance to supply chips. Elsewhere in the market, shares of AutoZone tumbled nearly 9% - despite the company reporting quarterly profit and revenue that beat estimates - as higher costs and inventory investments continued to pressure margins.
content: STORY: It was a mostly upbeat Tuesday on Wall Street, despite a slight move downward for the Dow. The S&P 500 climbed about six-tenths of a percent and the tech-heavy Nasdaq added roughly 1.2%, with both indexes closing at record highs. AI-fueled optimism offset concerns over Middle East peace talks, which were compounded by recent U.S. strikes on Iran. :: Micron Semiconductor stocks continued to lead the charge, with Micron Technology soaring 19%, hitting $1 trillion in market value for the first time after UBS more than tripled its price target on the stock. But Matt Stucky, chief portfolio manager for equities at Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management, finds the narrowness of market gains concerning. "Just to paint a picture of the contrast in the markets from pre-Iran conflict to post, if you look through the market for the first couple of months this year, 65% of companies were outperforming the index. Since the conflict commenced at the end of February, just 24% of companies are outperforming the S&P 500. [FLASH] Any time you see a market that becomes more narrow, as a portfolio manager, as an investor, you start to question the longevity and resilience of that market." Sticking with chip makers, shares of Qualcomm rose almost 4.5% after Bloomberg News reported the company reached a deal with TikTok owner ByteDance to supply chips. Elsewhere in the market, shares of AutoZone tumbled nearly 9% - despite the company reporting quarterly profit and revenue that beat estimates - as higher costs and inventory investments continued to pressure margins.
chineseTitle: 标普 500 指数、纳斯达克指数因 AI 乐观情绪创下收盘新高
chineseSummary: 故事：尽管道指小幅下跌，但华尔街周二表现基本乐观。标准普尔 500 指数上涨约十分之六，以科技股为主的纳斯达克指数上涨约 1.2%，两个指数均创下历史新高。人工智能引发的乐观情绪抵消了人们对中东和平谈判的担忧，而美国最近对伊朗的袭击加剧了中东和平谈判的担忧。美光半导体股票继续领涨，其中美光科技飙升 19%，在瑞银将该股目标价提高两倍以上后，该股市值首次突破 1 万亿美元。但西北互助财富管理公司(Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management)股票首席投资组合经理马特·斯塔基(Matt Stucky)发现，市场涨幅的窄幅令人担忧。 “为了描绘从伊朗冲突前到冲突后的市场对比，如果你纵观今年前几个月的市场，就会发现 65% 的公司表现优于指数。自 2 月底冲突开始以来，只有 24% 的公司表现优于标准普尔 500 指数。[FLASH] 每当你看到市场变得更加狭窄时，作为投资组合经理、作为投资者，你就会开始质疑该市场的寿命和弹性。市场”。与芯片制造商保持一致，在彭博新闻报道该公司与 TikTok 所有者字节跳动达成供应芯片协议后，高通股价上涨近 4.5%。在市场的其他地方，AutoZone 的股价下跌了近 9%，尽管该公司报告的季度利润和收入超出了预期，因为成本和库存投资的增加继续对利润率构成压力。
chineseContent: 故事：尽管道指小幅下跌，但华尔街周二表现基本乐观。标准普尔 500 指数上涨约十分之六，以科技股为主的纳斯达克指数上涨约 1.2%，两个指数均创下历史新高。人工智能引发的乐观情绪抵消了人们对中东和平谈判的担忧，而美国最近对伊朗的袭击加剧了中东和平谈判的担忧。美光半导体股票继续领涨，其中美光科技飙升 19%，在瑞银将该股目标价提高两倍以上后，该股市值首次突破 1 万亿美元。但西北互助财富管理公司(Northwestern Mutual Wealth Management)股票首席投资组合经理马特·斯塔基(Matt Stucky)发现，市场涨幅的窄幅令人担忧。 “为了描绘从伊朗冲突前到冲突后的市场对比，如果你纵观今年前几个月的市场，就会发现 65% 的公司表现优于指数。自 2 月底冲突开始以来，只有 24% 的公司表现优于标准普尔 500 指数。[FLASH] 每当你看到市场变得更加狭窄时，作为投资组合经理、作为投资者，你就会开始质疑该市场的寿命和弹性。市场”。与芯片制造商保持一致，在彭博新闻报道该公司与 TikTok 所有者字节跳动达成供应芯片协议后，高通股价上涨近 4.5%。在市场的其他地方，AutoZone 的股价下跌了近 9%，尽管该公司报告的季度利润和收入超出了预期，因为成本和库存投资的增加继续对利润率构成压力。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
